message:
feat(cli): add 'wa learn' command for interactive tutorials

New subcommand for the tutorial system:

wa learn                    Show track selection or resume current
wa learn basics             Start or resume the "basics" track
wa learn basics --complete  Mark current exercise as completed
wa learn basics --skip      Skip current exercise
wa learn --status           Show completion summary across tracks
wa learn --reset            Clear all tutorial progress
wa learn --json             Output as JSON for scripting

Integration with TutorialEngine from wa-core::learn:
- Loads/saves progress automatically
- Displays next exercise after completion
- Shows track and overall completion stats
- Handles track-specific commands

Help text includes examples and SEE ALSO references to related
commands (doctor, status).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
